data.title: Jim Cramer criticizes panic selling in high-growth sectors post strong GDP print, calls it 'stupid.' NVIDIA, AI, and crypto stocks affected.
data.description: Financial expert and television personality, Jim Cramer, expressed frustration on Tuesday over the panic caused by robust economic data impacting high-growth sectors like artificial intelligence and cryptocurrency. Cramer criticized the knee-jerk reaction as unwarranted, labeling it a continuous "big freakout" that affects companies such as NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) and those in the cryptocurrency, quantum computing, and data center spaces. The "Mad Money" host described the situation as "stupid," emphasizing how a strong economic number leads to declines in stocks related to NVIDIA, cryptocurrency, quantum technology, rockets, and data centers. Cramer's comments reflect his disbelief in the ongoing negative market response to positive economic data.

data.title: Stock futures drop on Christmas Eve despite strong Q3 GDP report. S&P 500 ended at new closing record. Dow Jones -0.07%, S&P 500 -0.06%, Nasdaq 100 -0.05%, Russell 2000 -0.10%. UiPath shares up 7.14%, Citius Pharmaceuticals climbs 8.65%. Fed likely to keep interest rates unchanged with 86.7% probability. Bond yields: 10-year 4.16%, two-year 3.53%. Markets close early on Christmas Eve, shut on Thursday.
data.description: U.S. stock futures declined on Wednesday following a higher close on Tuesday. Markets will close early on Christmas Eve and be shut on Christmas day. On Tuesday, the S&P 500 reached a new record high after GDP grew at a faster rate of 4.3% in the third quarter. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.16% and the two-year bond was at 3.53%. Markets are pricing an 86.7% likelihood of the Federal Reserve maintaining current interest rates. Notable changes in futures include Dow Jones -0.07%, S&P 500 -0.06%, Nasdaq 100 -0.05%, and Russell 2000 -0.10%. Shares of UiPath Inc. (PATH) rose 7.14% as it joins the S&P Midcap 400, while Citius Pharmaceuticals Inc. (CTXR) saw an 8.65% increase after reporting better-than-expected earnings. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF (QQQ) were lower in premarket trading. SPY was down 0.042% at $687.67, and QQQ declined 0.0024% to $621.96.

data.title: AST SpaceMobile launches its largest satellite, BlueBird 6, with a 2,400 sq ft array, offering 10x capacity of its 6 existing satellites.
data.description: AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTS) recently announced the deployment of the largest commercial communications array ever placed in low Earth orbit. The BlueBird 6 satellite was launched successfully at 10:25 p.m. EST on Dec. 23 from the Satish Dhawan Space Centre in India. This satellite boasts a significant size, covering nearly 2,400 square feet, which is approximately three times larger than AST SpaceMobile's previous BlueBird satellites. Additionally, the BlueBird 6 satellite offers ten times the capacity of the company's six satellites already in orbit. This development has garnered interest from AST SpaceMobile investors who are eagerly anticipating the outcome of the historic BlueBird launch and its impact on ASTS stock.

data.title: Ondo Finance aims to introduce tokenized US stocks on Solana by 2026 with custody-backed assets and compliance measures.
data.description: In 2026, the state of Ondo intends to introduce tokenized US stocks and ETFs on the Solana blockchain. This initiative will involve incorporating custody-backed assets, enabling on-chain transfers, and ensuring compliance within the system.

data.title: Market cap of many VC-backed crypto projects falls below valuations set in last funding rounds, revealing a significant gap.
data.description: The market capitalizations of various venture capital-backed cryptocurrency projects have considerably dropped from the valuations set during their previous private funding rounds.

data.title: Bybit enhances VIP Exclusive Airdrop with increased rewards and flexible prize structure, as the world's second-largest crypto exchange reports.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on December 24, 2025, Bybit, the global cryptocurrency exchange ranking second in trading volume, has revealed a significant enhancement to its weekly VIP Exclusive Airdrop. The update includes a revamped rewards system to cater to a variety of trading approaches.
